task_description: find the 100 largest files and save the results to a CSV file
code:
echo "Checking the contents of largest_files.csv"
head largest_files.csv

messages.content:
```bash
echo "Starting the process to find the 100 largest files."
find / -type f -exec du -h {} + 2>/dev/null | sort -rh | head -n 100 > largest_files.txt
echo "Finished finding the 100 largest files. Saved to largest_files.txt"
```

```bash
echo "Converting the largest_files.txt to CSV format."
awk '{print $2 "," $1}' largest_files.txt > largest_files.csv
echo "Conversion complete. CSV saved as largest_files.csv"
```
